'''Stassia''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. Its inhabitants were very tolerant under any circumstances. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Stassia was ruled by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] under the [[Governor/Legends|governorship]] of [[Tren Pergallis]].

{{Planet-stub}}
